_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+# human_description
+
+Parametric kinematic model of humans, in URDF format, for usage in robotics and HRI
\ No newline at end of file

data.author: lorenzoferrini
data.message:
fix joint limits for the arms

the joint limits for the arms were wrong, as they did not really
reflect the range of movements a human is able to perform. This
commit introduces realistic joint limits for human arms.

files.patch:
@@ -195,7 +195,7 @@
         </link>
         <joint name="${suffix}_y_shoulder_${id}" type="revolute">
             <axis xyz="0 0 ${reflect * -1}" />
-            <limit effort="1000" lower="-1.7" upper="1.1" velocity="0.5" />
+            <limit effort="1000" lower="-1.1" upper="1.9" velocity="0.5" />
             <parent link="${parent}"/>
             <child link="${suffix}_y_shoulder_${id}"/>
             <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0 ${reflect * neck_shoulder_length} 0" />
